name: AQUA POWER SYSTEMS INC.
business: Aqua Power Systems Inc. is a blank check shell company with nominal operations and assets, seeking to acquire or merge with a business opportunity. It has not yet generated any revenues from operations. The company holds a digital asset (land) in the Sandbox metaverse.

exposures.sentence: On February 14, 2022, the Company acquired a digital asset commonly referred to as land within the Sandbox metaverse.
